ModBotRelease.Changelog: - Fixed weapon skins not appearing in customization editor

GitHubRelease.Changelog:
# Changes
- Reworked customization items list. All weapon skins now have previews
- Fundamental changes across the mod
- Added arrow spawn point object customization editor
- Added logo particles option to title screen customization
- Added restart adventure button to reworked pause menu (finally)
- Added great swords modifier to story mode
- Increased scythe speed
- Reorganized settings
- Removed home page in settings menu
- Added cooldown slider for scroll to switch weapon setting
- Added more FPS options and increased FPS limit
- Increased FOV override limit
- Added tint color and rotation settings to realistic skyboxes
- Improved customization items export-import process
- Business bots ties are no longer visible in first person mode
- Various code changes
- Reduced mod size
# Fixes
- First person mode not working after mind trasnfer in story mode
- Weapon skins disappearing after death
- Realistic skyboxes applying to Last bot standing waiting room
- Being able to see through walls with high FOV
